title: Workspaces with fewer than 2 admins
recommendation: Assign at least two workspace admins (preferably via a security group) to avoid orphan risk.

title: Sensitivity label coverage
recommendation: Apply sensitivity labels to datasets, reports, lakehouses, warehouses; enforce via tenant setting and Purview integration.

title: Workspaces following documented naming convention
recommendation: Document and enforce a naming convention combining environment + layer markers (e.g. `<domain>-<env>-<layer>`).

title: Workspaces under source control (governance view)
recommendation: Require Git integration on all production workspaces — provides audit trail and rollback for governance evidence.

title: Sharing events in last 7 day(s)
recommendation: Review high-volume sharers; enforce sharing via Apps + security groups rather than ad-hoc per-report sharing.

title: Workspaces with content but no activity in last 7 day(s)
recommendation: Confirm the owner; if the workspace is no longer used, archive it to reduce attack surface and capacity load.

title: Fabric Capacity Metrics app is installed
recommendation: Install the Microsoft Fabric Capacity Metrics app so capacity CU, throttling, and overload events can be monitored over time - it is the primary tool for diagnosing capacity health and right-sizing.
